observed_results: make prompt-guide passed in the dedicated worktree.
make wellness passed; it still reports production deploy lag from Hostinger SSH timeout outside this code change.
local_validation.notes: Homebrew python3 hung while validate.sh tried to refresh the BP table, so local validation used the system Python path first in PATH. The validator and loaded Form workloads were otherwise unchanged.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: Pending merge and public deploy verification. Current known external blocker is Hostinger SSH timeout during deploy sync.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The BML compiler picture now has a concrete BML-owned source lowerer: typed source declarations, a bootstrap parser adapter interface, typed carriers, a concrete declaration-lowering stage, and a concrete source-lowering flow wired into ModernBMLCompiler.
test_flows: cd form && env PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$PATH" ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-concrete-source-lowerer-proof.fk

phase_gate.reason: This step moves concrete source-lowering architecture into BML and proves its shape. Full self-hosted execution of BMLCompilerSourceLoweringFlow, then retirement of the matching Form proof bridge, remains next.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/bml/bmf-bml-compiler-picture.bml now contains BMLSourceDeclaration, BMLSourceParser, BMLSourceCarrier, BMLCompilerDeclarationLoweringStage, and BMLCompilerSourceLoweringFlow as high-level BML source.
ModernBMLCompiler owns a BMLCompilerSourceLoweringFlow field and exposes AttachSourceParser to bind the temporary parser adapter at the bootstrap boundary.
form/form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk adds method-signature parsing and a narrowly enabled interface body parser so BMLSourceParser.ParseDeclarations is visible to proof.
form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-concrete-source-lowerer-proof.fk proves 31 concrete source-lowering claims across Go, Rust, and TypeScript.
kernels/BMF_BML_COMPILER_PICTURE.md names the concrete BML lowerer and keeps the next retirement target as execution through the BML compiler path.
